Mera Favourite — Red❤️

🍷

Red — deep, bold, aur dil se. Jaise kuch feelings hoti hain jo words mein nahi aati, bas mehsoos hoti hain, Ye mera Passion represent karta h. but Red without White, iska koi significence nahi bachta White colour Red ko uska Contrast deta h, Same mere liye tum important ho ❤️
